people.person: a young boy in a dark suit
people.action: kneeling on the ground, holding a wand, looking up at a giant figure.

scene.setting: a dimly lit, underground-like area with a greenish hue.

key_actions: A large, muscular figure with a beard roars and swings a weapon at a line of soldiers in armor.
